ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the registrant */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales data */,
  "q1_sales" REAL /* Sales in grams for the first quarter */,
  "q2_sales" REAL /* Sales in grams for the second quarter */,
  "q3_sales" REAL /* Sales in grams for the third quarter */,
  "q4_sales" REAL /* Sales in grams for the fourth quarter */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales in grams for the year */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pharmaceutical product being sold */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the pharmaceutical product being sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for each sales record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the registrant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City associated with the zip code */,
  "state" TEXT /* State associated with the zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the zip code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region associated with the zip code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the zip code */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the registrant */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the report (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales in grams for the specified period */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales team, compliance officer, supply chain manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for each user */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for each role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_sales_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the registrant */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the compliance report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the compliance report */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance report (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the registrant */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the forecast */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the forecast (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  "forecasted_sales" REAL /* Forecasted sales in grams for the specified period */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for forecasting (e.g., ARIMA, machine learning) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_levels" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the registrant */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the inventory record */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the inventory record (e.g., Jan, Feb) */,
  "inventory_level" REAL /* Current inventory level in grams */,
  "reorder_level" REAL /* Reorder level for each product */,
  "lead_time" REAL /* Lead time for each product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the pharmaceutical product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)
